message:
feat(fs): add io_uring file operations module

Introduce optional io_uring-based file operations for Linux systems.

Changes:
- src/fs/mod.rs: Add conditional compilation for uring module
- src/fs/uring.rs: New module providing:
  - Async file read/write with io_uring submission queue batching
  - fsync and fdatasync operations
  - Vectored I/O support (readv/writev)
  - Integration with runtime's sqe_channel for cooperative scheduling

The io_uring integration provides significant performance improvements
for I/O-heavy workloads on Linux 5.1+ kernels by reducing syscall
overhead and enabling true asynchronous file I/O.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
